nodes.label: P2.6 digits — per-task feature drift and SCFF-probe forgetting check
nodes.rationale: Left: SCFF hidden-feature drift (||h_t-h_{t-1}||) is nearly identical for single-block vs boosted-read (both sleep-consolidated), rising to ~0.55 by task block 3 then settling ~0.42-0.45 -- drift compounds only slightly with more blocks, the measurement handed to the Phase-4/6 maintenance gate. Right: SCFF all-class linear-probe accuracy stays flat/noisy ~0.91-0.935 across tasks for every condition -- the SCFF representation itself does not forget; sleep on the GD readout, not SCFF, is what is decisive.
